DoOR.data v2.0.1.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

door_response_matrix

Source: R/DoOR.data-package.R
door_response_matrix.Rd

The actual DoOR response matrix containing the consensus data as produced by create_door_database(). Data are globally normalized across responding units.

Format

'data.frame': 693 obs. of 78 variables: $ ac1A : num 0.0627 0.0226 0.4768 0.061 NA ... $ ac1B : num 0.0697 NA NA 0.1133 NA ... $ ac2A : num 0.056 0.0868 0.0496 0.8839 NA ... $ ac2B : num 0.0709 NA NA
